subject: Urgent: Your PayPal account has been suspended
body: Dear Customer, your PayPal account has been suspended due to suspicious activity. Click the link below to verify your identity immediately or your account will be permanently closed. Failure to verify within 24 hours will result in account termination.

subject: Your AdWords account has been suspended
body: Dear Advertiser, we were unable to process your payment. Your ads will be suspended soon unless you update your payment information immediately. Please sign into your account and update your billing details to prevent service interruption.

subject: Python 3.0a1 released!
body: The release is available from http://python.org/download/releases/3.0/. I will send a longer announcement to python-list and python-announce-list. Please blog about this if you have a blog! Thanks to all who helped out. It has been a great ride.

subject: Urgent: Verify your bank account now
body: Your Bank of America account requires immediate verification. We have detected unusual login attempts. Click here to verify your account and restore full access. You must verify within 12 hours or your account will be locked.

subject: Team lunch on Friday?
body: Hey! Just wanted to check if you are free for team lunch this Friday at noon. We are thinking of going to that new Italian place downtown. Let me know if that works for you and I will add you to the group chat.

subject: Your Netflix account will be cancelled
body: We were unable to process your Netflix payment. Your subscription will be cancelled unless you update your payment method immediately. Click the link below to update your billing information and keep your account active.

subject: Service alert: spamassassin.zones.apache.org is OK
body: ASF Nagios Notification. Type: RECOVERY. Host: spamassassin.zones.apache.org. Address: 140.211.11.80. Service: BBMASS. State: OK. Date and Time: Fri Aug 08 12:00:03 GMT 2008. No action required.

subject: You have a pending tax refund of $3,200
body: Congratulations! The IRS has determined that you are eligible for a tax refund of $3,200. To claim your refund, please verify your identity and bank account information immediately. This offer expires in 48 hours.

subject: Re: Code freeze for VMS fixes
body: Jos and John have made significant progress on CPANPLUS and I think they are close to having it resolved. There will be some minor collateral damage to the code freeze in other modules like File::Copy but pretty small and usually VMS only. I will take another look at File::Find after I build the current blead.

subject: Your package could not be delivered
body: We attempted to deliver your package but were unable to complete the delivery. A customs fee of $2.99 is required before we can release your package. Please pay immediately to avoid your package being returned to sender.

subject: Federal Sales Training: Security Clearances Seminar
body: The Federal Sales Academy is offering a seminar on Security Clearances. Our instructor will provide proven techniques to obtaining a security clearance. Date: Thursday, March 13 in Bethesda, MD. Registration is now open. Call 866-519-4482 for questions.

subject: Your Apple ID has been locked
body: Your Apple ID has been locked due to security reasons. Someone tried to sign in to your account from an unrecognized device. Verify your identity immediately to unlock your account and prevent unauthorized access.

subject: Postfix on a laptop: disk spin-up issue
body: I tried to run Postfix on a laptop and came across an issue. While Postfix is running, the disk constantly spins up and never sleeps properly, even if Postfix has nothing to do and the queue is empty. I have found a solution using tmpfs mounts for the pid, private, and public directories. Happy to share the details if anyone is interested.

subject: Suspicious activity detected on your account
body: We have detected suspicious activity on your Chase account. For your protection, we have temporarily limited access to your account. Please verify your information immediately by clicking the link below. If you do not verify within 24 hours your account will be suspended.

subject: Re: Big Band Movies - Gene Krupa Story
body: As I recall, and it has been years since I have seen the Gene Krupa Story, there is a scene where a character mentions Bix Beiderbecke who is one of the guests. Chronologically Bix was long dead by this time but hey, it is Hollywood. The drumming in the film was actually done by Krupa himself.

subject: You have won 850,000 pounds in the UK lottery
body: We are pleased to inform you that your email address has won 850,000 British pounds in the UK National Lottery. To claim your prize you must respond immediately with your full name, address, and bank account details. This is not a joke. Claim now before the prize expires.

subject: New IT jobs matching your profile
body: Your Dice job alert has found new matches. Systems Engineer at Sapphire Technologies in Middletown NJ. UNIX Consultant at IntraGlobe in Boston MA. SAP Security at Novasoft Information Technology in Danvers MA. SQL and Oracle DBA at Aspect Consulting in King of Prussia PA. Visit Dice.com to apply.

subject: Urgent business proposal - $15 million transfer
body: Dear Friend, I am Prince Daniel of Nigeria and I need your urgent assistance to transfer $15 million USD out of my country. I will give you 30 percent of the total sum for your assistance. Please reply immediately with your bank account details to proceed.

subject: Google Alert - machine learning research
body: Google Web Alert for machine learning research. New results from Stanford University show advances in neural network training techniques. Researchers at MIT have published findings on reinforcement learning applications. Visit Google Alerts to manage your alert preferences.

subject: Get your Mother's Day gift online - easy and fast
body: Dear Tony, we are not going to pester you with lots of Mother's Day content. We just wanted to draw your attention to some unique personalised gifts. We offer photo mugs, key rings, ceramic tiles, canvas prints, and gift vouchers. Last order dates are approaching so please order soon.
